content.text:
<think>
The user wants a longer joke. Let me think of a good one that's a bit more elaborate.
</think>

A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks...

*"Can I join you?"*

---

Actually, here's a better one:

A programmer's wife tells him: "Go to the store and get a loaf of bread. If they have eggs, get a dozen."

The programmer goes to the store, sees they have eggs, and buys 12 loaves of bread.

---

Or if you want a classic:

A developer gets stuck in a loop. He wakes up, goes to work, codes, sleeps, wakes up, goes to work, codes, sleeps...

His friend asks: "How'd you get out?"

He says: "I threw an exception."

His friend asks: "And then?"

He says: "I caught it and continued."
